caption: Two men are positioned in a room, sitting in front of a large television screen. The man on the left wears a dark grey t-shirt, while the man on the right wears a light grey t-shirt and a necklace; he holds his hand to his mouth in a thoughtful or reacting gesture. Behind them is a shelf filled with numerous DVDs or CDs. On the television screen, the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" appears in orange capital letters at the top. Below this text, a smaller video window shows a scene with two women; one is dressed in a dark garment and the other in a red and blue sari. In the smaller video window, the caption "No, Sister" is visible at the bottom. Across the frames, the men remain largely still, maintaining their positions and expressions as they watch the screen.
